creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
Created attachment 188906
security/py27-keyring-10.5.1.diff

Upgraded security/py-keyring to 10.5.1 [1]. There is one warning from portlint, but I suspect it is just not up to date with FLAVORS yet:

WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports/devel/py-setuptools_scm@py27 found, even though it is listed in BUILD_DEPENDS.

[1] https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jaraco/keyring/10.5.1/CHANGES.rst

portlint: OK (0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 103amd64, 111i386, 111amd64; flavors: py27, py36)
